session.user:
Run the plan_save tests and report the results. Command: uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_plan_save.py -x -v
Report the full output including any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run the plan_save tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run plan_save tests with verbose output
